name: Toei Sonic - CD
description:
Faster than Light and runs with the wind!

A hero that doesn't stop until He feels complete and gets the job finished!


SONIC!

He's not a man to give up and he's not a man to go down! Where his legs take him, he goes too! Enjoying life to the fullest is one of his goals. And stopping Eggman is his favorite part of it!

So what are you doing reading this???

And don't waste your precious time Doing nothing. If you wanna do it, do it right away. Do it with the time that you have!
creator: Burntmeat
